title: Brass Table Lamp with Fabric Shade
shortDescription: Solid brass base with a hand-stitched linen shade.
description: A weighty, solid-brass lamp base paired with a hand-stitched linen shade. Ships with a 1.5m fabric-braided cord and a standard E27 fitting; bulb not included. Polish occasionally with a dry cloth to keep the shine.
